border: none; padding: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 15px;">\(z_t = W_{xh}x_t + W_{hh}h_{t-1}+b_{h}\)&nbsp;</font></blockquote><blockquote style="margin: 0 0 0 40px; border: none; padding: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 15px;"><br></font></blockquote><blockquote style="margin: 0 0 0 40px; border: none; padding: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 15px;">\(h_{t} = tanh(z_t)\)</font></blockquote><blockquote style="margin: 0 0 0 40px; border: none; padding: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 15px;"><br></font></blockquote><blockquote style="margin: 0 0 0 40px; border: none; padding: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 15px;">\(y_{t} = W_{hy}h_{t} + b_{y}\)</font></blockquote>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="301.94" x="221.27999999999997" y="-5750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="\(=\)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="98.27999999999997" y="-5698" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
